command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$coincidentConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vụ việc %s &Job.Nested.Message.v; trong danh mục vụ việc.' else N'The job %s is &Job.Nested.Message.e;.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vụ việc %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the job %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vụ việc %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the job %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vụ việc %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The job %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$coincidentConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vụ việc mẹ và con không được trùng nhau.' else N'Invalid parent job code. It is coincident with job code.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where &Job.Nested.Key.a;) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_vv)) as message return end &UnitBeforeInsert; select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_vv.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_vv <> $ma_vv.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where &Job.Nested.Key.a; and ma_vv <> $ma_vv.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_vv)) as message return end
declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_vv.OldValue)) if exists(select * from cdvv where ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select * from lkvv where ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select * from v20vvlkct where ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select * from ct00 where ma_vv = $ma_vv.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vv' as field, @message as message return end end
if @ma_vv = @ma_vv_me begin select 'ma_vv_me' as field, @$coincidentConflict as message return end
&UnitBeforeUpdate;

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_vv = @ma_vv
&UnitPostUpdate;

declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_vv)) if exists(select * from cdvv where ma_vv = @ma_vv) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select * from lkvv where ma_vv = @ma_vv) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select * from v20vvlkct where ma_vv = @ma_vv) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select * from ct00 where ma_vv = @ma_vv) begin select @message as message return end
&UnitPostDelete;
